_comment: MCP servers available to Claude Code in this repo. Secrets are read from the shell environment (never hardcoded) via ${VAR} expansion. See docs/ai-native-sdlc.md for which servers are used at which SDLC stage.

github._use: PR creation/review, issue linking, CI status checks

jira._use: Requirement traceability: reading tickets, updating status, linking PRs

postgres._use: Schema inspection and read-only querying for agent data models. Never point at a writable production connection string.

playwright._use: E2E testing of agent UIs and the internal console; used by test-engineer agent and /test

filesystem._use: Sandboxed filesystem access scoped to the repo root

context7._use: Up-to-date library/framework documentation lookup to avoid stale API usage in generated code

slack._use: Human-in-the-loop approvals and notifications for agent actions (see rules/human-in-the-loop.md)

openapi._use: Grounding API-consuming agents (CRM, billing, marketing automation) in the real contract instead of hallucinated endpoints

browser._use: Ad-hoc web research and verification for RFP Response and ROI Calculator agents (e.g. pulling public pricing pages)
